intro: Geunsia cumingiana, also known as Geunsia, is a medicinal plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its reported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Geunsia cumingiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
